offer: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient categorization of expense receipts causes time wastage. We convert receipt photos into categorized entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
problem: Inefficient categorization of expense receipts leads to time wastage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeeping advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 bookkeepers with demo video
Join community forums for bookkeeping tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try categorizing 1-3 receipts for free.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used categories as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing receipts
Enable one-click export of categorized reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
